text.title: Freelancer Discovery Call Template Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: pre-call-prep
step.action: Fill prospect{name, company, role} + skim their site. Note 2 hypotheses.

step.name: run-call
step.action: Cover all 5 sections; enforce 70/30 listen ratio.
step.decision-gate: If operator_word_share > 30%, pause and switch to mirroring/silence.

step.name: score
step.action: Score 5 axes (fit, urgency, budget, decision power, vibes); compute total.

step.name: draft-proposal-seed
step.action: Write 1-page proposal seed: problem, approach, scope, price, timeline.

step.name: send-and-followup
step.action: Run `validate-freelancer-discovery-call-template.py`. Send proposal within 24h; schedule follow-up.
